channel.title: johnnymorilloo TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from johnnymorilloo

item.title: What I ate in the Big Apple 🍎 Save this for your next visit #vegannyc #matchanyc #vegannfoodinnyc #nycvegan

item.title: Vegan market in the Philippines 🇵🇭 Every Sunday in Mandala Park @goodfoodsundays #veganfilipino #veganmarket #goodfoodsundays #veganfilipinofood
item.description: Vegan market in the Philippines 🇵🇭 Every Sunday in Mandala Park @goodfoodsundays #veganfilipino #veganmarket #goodfoodsundays #veganfilipinofood

item.title: Would you try these dishes? #veganfilipino #veganmarket #goodfoodsundays #veganfilipinofood
item.description: Would you try these dishes? #veganfilipino #veganmarket #goodfoodsundays #veganfilipinofood

item.title: A fully vegan restaurant in the Philippines I came here two years ago and I was so impressed and I really wanted to come back here. So if you really want to try a Filipino comfort food at its finest come here and wait for part two for more meals I ate. 4F
item.description: A fully vegan restaurant in the Philippines I came here two years ago and I was so impressed and I really wanted to come back here. So if you really want to try a Filipino comfort food at its finest come here and wait for part two for more meals I ate. 4F

item.title: A fully vegan restaurant in the Philippines If you watched my previous video about this place, go have a look because there are so many other people that can agree with me - this place is amazing! 4F, 4980 P. Guanzon, Poblacion, Makati City 1210 Metro If
item.description: A fully vegan restaurant in the Philippines If you watched my previous video about this place, go have a look because there are so many other people that can agree with me - this place is amazing! 4F, 4980 P. Guanzon, Poblacion, Makati City 1210 Metro If

item.title: Johnny’s Menu: First plate of the Christmas dinner I’m on a mission to show you that a plant-based Christmas feast can be just as tasty and satisfying as any other. So come with me, you can make the whole menu or just parts of it. Let’s not have empty s
item.description: Johnny’s Menu: First plate of the Christmas dinner I’m on a mission to show you that a plant-based Christmas feast can be just as tasty and satisfying as any other. So come with me, you can make the whole menu or just parts of it. Let’s not have empty s

item.title: Crispy Smashed Garlic Roast Potatoes Air fryer: 200°C for 12 to 16 minutes Ingredients • 1kg baby potatoes • 3 tbsp melted vegan butter • 3 garlic cloves grated • 1 tbsp chopped rosemary • Pinch of salt Method Boil potatoes. Smash on a tray. Pour gar
item.description: Crispy Smashed Garlic Roast Potatoes Air fryer: 200°C for 12 to 16 minutes Ingredients • 1kg baby potatoes • 3 tbsp melted vegan butter • 3 garlic cloves grated • 1 tbsp chopped rosemary • Pinch of salt Method Boil potatoes. Smash on a tray. Pour gar

item.title: Last minute gifting ideas I djd a similar video last year, so why not come back. It’s an excuse to look at new items in the Selfridges food hall as honestly I could say that forever. Anyways, if you have a foodie friend or someone who loves food as much a

item.title: everything made in the air fryer Maple Mustard Roasted Carrots Time:180°C - 15 to 18 minutes Ingredients 600g carrots 2 tbsp maple syrup 1 tbsp mustard 1 tbsp olive oil Pinch of salt Method Mix maple, mustard and oil. Coat carrots. Air fry until caramelis
item.description: everything made in the air fryer Maple Mustard Roasted Carrots Time:180°C - 15 to 18 minutes Ingredients 600g carrots 2 tbsp maple syrup 1 tbsp mustard 1 tbsp olive oil Pinch of salt Method Mix maple, mustard and oil. Coat carrots. Air fry until caramelis

item.title: 🧀 Crispy Air Fryer Vegan Cheese Cauliflower Cauliflower 1 large cauliflower, cut into florets 1½ tbsp olive oil Salt and black pepper 1 tsp smoked paprika Cheese sauce 40 g vegan butter 40 g plain flour 600 ml unsweetened soy milk 120 g vegan mature chedd
item.description: 🧀 Crispy Air Fryer Vegan Cheese Cauliflower Cauliflower 1 large cauliflower, cut into florets 1½ tbsp olive oil Salt and black pepper 1 tsp smoked paprika Cheese sauce 40 g vegan butter 40 g plain flour 600 ml unsweetened soy milk 120 g vegan mature chedd

item.title: Maple Glazed Tofu Ham Air fryer: 190°C for 18 minutes Ingredients 600 g smoked tofu or extra firm tofu Maple glaze 3 tbsp soy sauce 2 tbsp maple syrup 1 tbsp mustard 1 tbsp brown sugar 1 tsp smoked paprika 1 tsp Marmite 1 tbsp garlic paste 200 ml vegetabl
item.description: Maple Glazed Tofu Ham Air fryer: 190°C for 18 minutes Ingredients 600 g smoked tofu or extra firm tofu Maple glaze 3 tbsp soy sauce 2 tbsp maple syrup 1 tbsp mustard 1 tbsp brown sugar 1 tsp smoked paprika 1 tsp Marmite 1 tbsp garlic paste 200 ml vegetabl

item.title: Ultimate Mushroom Wellington Made in an air fryer or use an oven! Air fryer: 180°C for 20 to 25 minutes until crispy and golden, as each machine is always different. So just check that it’s not burned Oven: 200°C (fan) Time: 30 to 35 minutes Ingredients
item.description: Ultimate Mushroom Wellington Made in an air fryer or use an oven! Air fryer: 180°C for 20 to 25 minutes until crispy and golden, as each machine is always different. So just check that it’s not burned Oven: 200°C (fan) Time: 30 to 35 minutes Ingredients

item.title: 2026 food goals ⚡️ The mission has always been to eat less meat and eat better. To show that food made with plants can be comforting, satisfying, and full of flavour. This page is easy, high-protein meals that fit real life and active days. You can simply
item.description: 2026 food goals ⚡️ The mission has always been to eat less meat and eat better. To show that food made with plants can be comforting, satisfying, and full of flavour. This page is easy, high-protein meals that fit real life and active days. You can simply

item.title: 3 easy tofu marinades + how to cook them Using extra firm tofu (400–450g) Marinate 20 mins minimum (longer = better) Cook it Air fryer 180°C 12–15 mins Bake 200°C 25–30 mins Pan fry medium high until golden Marinades 1. Soy, ginger & sesame 2. Coconut n
item.description: 3 easy tofu marinades + how to cook them Using extra firm tofu (400–450g) Marinate 20 mins minimum (longer = better) Cook it Air fryer 180°C 12–15 mins Bake 200°C 25–30 mins Pan fry medium high until golden Marinades 1. Soy, ginger & sesame 2. Coconut n

item.title: Champorado 🇵🇭 Filipino rice porridge This is dish is an adaptation of the Mexican champurrado, which is a thick chocolate drink using masa harina. Instead we use glutinous rice (the rice we use for Arroz Caldo). I used unsweetened cacao powder rather tha
item.description: Champorado 🇵🇭 Filipino rice porridge This is dish is an adaptation of the Mexican champurrado, which is a thick chocolate drink using masa harina. Instead we use glutinous rice (the rice we use for Arroz Caldo). I used unsweetened cacao powder rather tha

item.title: best 3 tofu marinades for 2026 pt 2(4–5 servings). What’s up people! You love the marinades last time, so made these delicious ones. I’ve slightly adjusted it so you can have more marinade to play around to drizzle your amazing goods :) Use what you need,

item.title: Lugaw (1-2 serving) if you like me and you’re feeling under the weather, then look no further for this amazing recipe. This is the one recipe that I know will make me feel good and always remind me of my mum. 🔪: @katto_kitchen Ingredients • ½ cup glutin

item.title: Creamy chicken (ve) Growing up this is one of my favourite dishes that my dad used to cook, I don’t know why but the simplicity of it soon became my favourite and I used to beg my dad to cook this all the time. So hopefully you enjoyed this dish as much a
item.description: Creamy chicken (ve) Growing up this is one of my favourite dishes that my dad used to cook, I don’t know why but the simplicity of it soon became my favourite and I used to beg my dad to cook this all the time. So hopefully you enjoyed this dish as much a

item.title: Lion’s Mane Steak (Juicy, Smoky & Meaty) This Lion’s Mane steak is tender, flavourful, and packed with umami goodness. It sears beautifully, has that perfect chew, and best of all—it’s 100% vegan. I am not the first creator to use Lion’s Mane mushroom, bu
item.description: Lion’s Mane Steak (Juicy, Smoky & Meaty) This Lion’s Mane steak is tender, flavourful, and packed with umami goodness. It sears beautifully, has that perfect chew, and best of all—it’s 100% vegan. I am not the first creator to use Lion’s Mane mushroom, bu

item.title: Couldn’t be happier @SourceofLife
item.description: Couldn’t be happier @SourceofLife

item.title: (ve) Pork Menudo INGREDIENTS - 200g protein (previously used @eatplanted but honestly use anything you like) - 2 tbsp soy sauce - 1/2 piece of lemon - 2 tbsp Veg Oil - 1 small onion, sliced - 2-3 garlic gloves, chopped - 2-3 dried pieces of bay leaves
item.description: (ve) Pork Menudo INGREDIENTS - 200g protein (previously used @eatplanted but honestly use anything you like) - 2 tbsp soy sauce - 1/2 piece of lemon - 2 tbsp Veg Oil - 1 small onion, sliced - 2-3 garlic gloves, chopped - 2-3 dried pieces of bay leaves
